diagrams.title: Three-Schema Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows three levels of database architecture: External, Conceptual, and Internal schemas with mappings between them
diagrams.purpose: Understanding data abstraction and how different users view data at different levels of detail

diagrams.title: File Processing vs Database Approach
diagrams.description: Comparison diagram showing traditional file processing (isolated files with duplication) versus database approach (centralized integrated database)
elements: Shared data accessed by all applications
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how database approach eliminates redundancy and provides centralized data control

diagrams.title: Data Independence Layers
diagrams.description: Stack diagram showing physical and logical data independence between schema levels
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how schema changes at one level do not affect other levels

visuals.title: Characteristics Of Database Approach
visuals.description: Visual diagram for characteristics of database approach
